String: These pants are worn by those who seek to intimidate their enemies.
Looking dark and mysterious is a useful tool to gain information through intimidation.
The pants of somebody who can't stop dancing.
A reward for backing our Kickstarter campaign, these pants will make your dedication to the game clear.

The shoes made popular by the agents of the Galactic Intelligence Service. Despite being purpose-made for the GIS, it has been released for purchase by the average citizen in limited supply in order due to popular demand.
